get.summary: Get user object by username (one request required). If speed is crucial, it's more efficient to use the by/id endpoint for quicker responses.
get.description: Get user object by username. Returns a User object.

x-codeSamples.source:
from hikerapi import Client

cl = Client(<ACCESS_KEY>)
res = await cl.user_by_username_v2(username="sun")
x-codeSamples.label: Python

get.description: ⚠️ Billing: 2 requests per call. Returns a list of Story objects.

parameters.name: force

schema.description: Skip account privacy check
schema.title: Force

schema.description: Convert all big integers to strings
schema.title: Safe Int

parameters.description: Convert all big integers to strings

x-codeSamples.source:

get.summary: Get a user followers (one request required). Prefer /g2/user/followers
get.description: Get part (one page) of followers users with cursor. Returns a list of User objects.

parameters.name: user_id

schema.description: Id of user account
schema.title: User Id

parameters.description: Id of user account

parameters.name: page_id

schema.description: Use value of field `next_page_id` from response for getting next page
schema.title: Page Id

parameters.description: Use value of field `next_page_id` from response for getting next page

x-codeSamples.source:
from hikerapi import Client

cl = Client(<ACCESS_KEY>)
followers, next_page_id = await cl.user_followers_v2(
    user_id="123123", page_id=None).values()
x-codeSamples.label: Python

get.description:
Fetch suggested users details by target_id.

expand_suggestion=True for more detailed response

x-codeSamples.source:

cl = Client(<ACCESS_KEY>)
users = await cl.user_suggested_profiles_v2(
    user_id="1338246453", expand_suggestion=True)
